info.description: This provides the REST API for Pulsar Source operations
info.title: Pulsar Source REST API

200.description: Fetches the list of built-in Pulsar IO sources

403.description: The requester doesn't have admin permissions

503.description: Function worker service is now initializing. Please try again later.

parameters.description: The name of the builtin source
parameters.name: name

503.description: Function worker service is now initializing. Please try again later.
